Headline: OpenAI launches new AI coding assistant for developers
story:
San Francisco, May 11 (PTI) OpenAI on Monday announced a new AI-powered coding assistant aimed at improving developer productivity.

The assistant can generate code snippets, explain errors, and optimize applications using natural language prompts.

The company stated that the feature will initially roll out to enterprise users before becoming publicly available later this year.

Headline: Tesla reports increase in quarterly electric vehicle deliveries
story:
New York, May 11 (PTI) Tesla on Monday reported a significant rise in quarterly electric vehicle deliveries despite global supply chain challenges.

The company said strong demand in Asian and European markets contributed to the increase in sales figures.

Analysts believe the company's expansion of battery manufacturing facilities has improved production efficiency.

Headline: Indian government announces new semiconductor manufacturing policy
story:
New Delhi, May 11 (PTI) The Indian government on Monday introduced a new semiconductor manufacturing policy aimed at boosting domestic chip production.

The policy includes tax incentives, infrastructure support, and funding assistance for companies setting up fabrication units in India.

Officials said the initiative is expected to strengthen the country's technology and electronics ecosystem over the next decade.
